programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: Jess and Jimmy are each selling their homes and pooling their resources to find the perfect place to start their life together; their tour takes them from a sleek, open-concept home built for unforgettable gatherings, to a grand lakeside bungalow where every window frames nature's beauty, and finally to a cozy island log cabin with sunlit lofts and decks made for relaxing by the water; which home can become their dream retreat?

programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: Paul and Sharena are on the hunt for their dream lakefront home, balancing Sharena's love of glitz with Paul's rustic tastes; their first stop is a sleek, modern home with mirrored cabinets, crystal light fixtures, a built-in vanity in the primary suite, and a sparkling pool, perfect for Sharena; next, they tour a rustic retreat with vaulted ceilings, exposed beams, and a trail leading through nature to the lake, Paul's ideal escape; the final home blends both styles with an oversized kitchen.

programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: Rory and Karly dream of raising their kids in a house on the lake, and they're searching for their very first waterfront property; he likes modern and she wants rustic; will this couple come to a compromise, or will they need two lake houses?

programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: Don and Agnes visit lakefront properties in search of their forever home after retirement.

programs.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programs.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programs.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programs.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.
